description_long: This is a tall, rectangular bag of coffee labeled 'BREWHOUSE HOUSE BLEND' with a capacity of 1KG (2.2LB). The front of the bag features a bold red and white design with large, modern typography, while the sides are predominantly red with the words 'HAND CRAFTED' in white. The back of the bag displays the Brewhouse Coffee Roasters logo, social media icons, and additional branding information. The packaging appears to be made of a matte, paper-based material with a gusseted bottom for stability. The bag is sealed at the top, suggesting it is unopened and designed to keep the contents fresh. The overall appearance is artisanal and premium, suitable for display in urban cafes or specialty grocery stores.
description: A tall, rectangular paper coffee bag labeled 'BREWHOUSE HOUSE BLEND' with bold red and white graphics and artisanal branding. The bag is sealed and features a matte finish with prominent 'HAND CRAFTED' text on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red panel with large white 'HAND CRAFTED' text and the folded, gusseted edge.
description_view_1: Back view displaying the Brewhouse Coffee Roasters logo, social media icons, and product information on a beige background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the continuation of the red 'HAND CRAFTED' text and the bag's seam visible.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main 'BREWHOUSE HOUSE BLEND' branding, weight indication, and bold red and white color blocks.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular Brewhouse Coffee Roasters logo with a bird and coffee cup, located on the back of the bag in red and white.
